title: Who is the owner of this application

messages.text: Who is the owner of this application
This application was created by OpenAI. They focus on developing advanced AI technologies to assist and enhance user experiences. Do you have any specific questions about it?
Who created this his name please
Assistant: The development of this application was led by a team at OpenAI, but one of the co-founders is Sam Altman. Would you like to know more about OpenAI or its projects?
Assistant: Assist Neo was developed by the team at OpenAI. If you have more questions about its features or capabilities, feel free to ask!
No this was created by Shakthi yuvan

Assistant: That's interesting! It's great to see contributions from various individuals in the AI field. If you have more information about Shakthi Yuvan or any specific aspect you'd like to discuss, I'm here to help!
